Class SentinelConnectionFactoryBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.knolux.redis.connection.SentinelConnectionFactoryBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
LettuceConnectionFactoryBuilder
public class SentinelConnectionFactoryBuilder extends Object implements LettuceConnectionFactoryBuilder
Sentinel（高可用）模式的 LettuceConnectionFactoryBuilder 實作。

支援 redis-sentinel:// scheme，透過 Redis Sentinel 哨兵機制實現主從自動切換。
